mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.devicename AS export_devicename,
d.datatablename AS datatablename,
d.view_tablename AS datatablename,
d.id_site FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dt.id IN (3,7,9) AND d.id_site = #{id_site} AND d.meter_type = #{meter_type} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,2,4)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,3,4)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,5,7)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,6,7)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1)

SELECT t.time_format, t.categories_time, ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ), 1 ) AS chart_energy_kwh,
ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ) / (IF(t.data_send_time = 1, 4, 12)), 1 ) AS avgEnergy,
ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ) / 24, 1 ) AS avgEnergy,
ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ) / DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(t.dateofmonth)), 1 ) AS avgEnergy,
t.time_full, t.id FROM (
SELECT dv.time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS dateofmonth,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y %H:00' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y %H:00' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%H:00') AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%d. %b' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%Y' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%Y' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS categories_time,
d.id, s.data_send_time,
MAX(nvmActiveEnergy) - MIN(nvmActiveEnergy) AS nvmActiveEnergy FROM ${item.datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND dp.is_user_defined = 1 AND dp.is_energy = 1 AND ${filterEnabled} = true LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf ON dp.id = dpf.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf.id_device AND (dpf.min_value IS NOT NULL OR dpf.max_value IS NOT NULL) WHERE s.id = #{item.id_site} AND d.id = #{item.id} AND (CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD(#{end_date},INTERVAL 1 DAY), "%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00")) AND s.`status` = 1 AND d.`status` = 1 GROUP BY d.id, time_format
) t GROUP BY
t.id,
t.time_format

SELECT t.time_format, t.categories_time, ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ), 1 ) AS chart_energy_kwh,
ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ) / (IF(t.data_send_time = 1, 4, 12)), 1 ) AS avgEnergy,
ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ) / 24, 1 ) AS avgEnergy,
ROUND( SUM( t.nvmActiveEnergy ) / DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(t.dateofmonth)), 1 ) AS avgEnergy,
t.time_full, t.id FROM ( SELECT dv.time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) AS dateofmonth,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y %H:00' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y %H:00' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%H:00') AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%d-%Y' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%d. %b' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%Y' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%Y' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%m-%Y' ) AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%b. %Y' ) AS categories_time,
d.id, s.data_send_time,
MAX(nvmActiveEnergy) - MIN(nvmActiveEnergy) AS nvmActiveEnergy FROM ${datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND dp.is_user_defined = 1 AND dp.is_energy = 1 AND ${filterEnabled} = true LEFT JOIN device_parameter_filter dpf ON dp.id = dpf.id_device_parameter AND d.id = dpf.id_device AND (dpf.min_value IS NOT NULL OR dpf.max_value IS NOT NULL) WHERE d.id = #{id} AND (CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD(#{end_date},INTERVAL 1 DAY), "%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00")) AND s.`status` = 1 AND d.`status` = 1 GROUP BY d.id, time_format ) t GROUP BY t.time_format
